news.title:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.
news.summary:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra expects AI-driven legacy modernisation to boost growth in financial and healthcare sectors over 2-3 years.
With record Q3FY26 bookings of $1.1B and a $500M telecom deal, EBIT margin target of 15% for FY27 stays firm.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra expects AI-driven legacy modernisation to boost growth in financial and healthcare sectors over 2-3 years.
With record Q3FY26 bookings of $1.1B and a $500M telecom deal, EBIT margin target of 15% for FY27 stays firm.

news.title:
Kotak Institutional Equities highlights TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge as top IT sector picks despite muted Q4FY26 growth and constrained FY27 visibility.
TCS shows stable margins; Infosys expects 3-5% FY27 growth; Coforge leads Q4FY26 with 19.7% YoY growth; Tech Mahindra reports flat revenue but margin gains.
news.summary:
Kotak Institutional Equities highlights TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge as top IT sector picks despite muted Q4FY26 growth and constrained FY27 visibility.
TCS shows stable margins; Infosys expects 3-5% FY27 growth; Coforge leads Q4FY26 with 19.7% YoY growth; Tech Mahindra reports flat revenue but margin gains.

news.title:
Weak rupee may aid IT stocks like Tech Mahindra by cushioning margins in Q4.
Currency tailwinds offset flat revenue growth and AI disruption concerns on valuations.
news.summary:
Weak rupee may aid IT stocks like Tech Mahindra by cushioning margins in Q4.
Currency tailwinds offset flat revenue growth and AI disruption concerns on valuations.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra's Board approved merger of its step-down subsidiaries in Costa Rica.
The merger aims to reduce operational costs, compliance risk, and entity count.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra's Board approved merger of its step-down subsidiaries in Costa Rica.
The merger aims to reduce operational costs, compliance risk, and entity count.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal recommends TCS, HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, & Coforge ahead of Q4 results.
HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge noted for resilience, growth, and strong execution by Motilal Oswal.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal recommends TCS, HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, & Coforge ahead of Q4 results.
HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, and Coforge noted for resilience, growth, and strong execution by Motilal Oswal.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra's P/E ratio stands at 28.6, above the industry's 21.3.
Despite Nifty 50 inclusion, it faces challenges in the competitive IT sector.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra's P/E ratio stands at 28.6, above the industry's 21.3.
Despite Nifty 50 inclusion, it faces challenges in the competitive IT sector.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra shares rose 4.7% to ₹1,404.70 despite Citi's 'sell' rating with a ₹1,260 target.
CLSA rated 'Outperform' with a ₹1,698 target, citing 21% upside potential.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra shares rose 4.7% to ₹1,404.70 despite Citi's 'sell' rating with a ₹1,260 target.
CLSA rated 'Outperform' with a ₹1,698 target, citing 21% upside potential.

news.title:
Infosys urges mid-senior managers to use AI in client projects for growth.
Move aims to counter prolonged demand slowdown amid macroeconomic challenges.
news.summary:
Infosys urges mid-senior managers to use AI in client projects for growth.
Move aims to counter prolonged demand slowdown amid macroeconomic challenges.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra's subsidiary to acquire 20% stake in Tech Mahindra Arabia.
The deal with Midad is valued at ₹2.06 billion.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra's subsidiary to acquire 20% stake in Tech Mahindra Arabia.
The deal with Midad is valued at ₹2.06 billion.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra and EPAM Systems innovate billing by factoring AI usage in rates.
AI adoption challenges traditional IT billing, sparking shift to outcome-based models.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra and EPAM Systems innovate billing by factoring AI usage in rates.
AI adoption challenges traditional IT billing, sparking shift to outcome-based models.

news.title:
TCS, Infosys, and Wipro saw market cap declines of 36%, 29%, and 42% respectively since 2021.
Tech Mahindra (+14%) and HCL Tech (+18%) improved market cap due to AI focus and diversified portfolios.
news.summary:
TCS, Infosys, and Wipro saw market cap declines of 36%, 29%, and 42% respectively since 2021.
Tech Mahindra (+14%) and HCL Tech (+18%) improved market cap due to AI focus and diversified portfolios.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra denies social media rumors of laying off 30,000 employees.
Company focuses on productivity; launches AI platform with Microsoft for data modernization.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra denies social media rumors of laying off 30,000 employees.
Company focuses on productivity; launches AI platform with Microsoft for data modernization.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra's strategy from 3 years ago boosts operating margins and large deal wins.
CEO cites growth strategy as key to sustainable progress and client trust.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra's strategy from 3 years ago boosts operating margins and large deal wins.
CEO cites growth strategy as key to sustainable progress and client trust.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra partners with Microsoft to develop Agentic AI platform for telecom sector.
The platform also focuses on managing data mesh changes effectively.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra partners with Microsoft to develop Agentic AI platform for telecom sector.
The platform also focuses on managing data mesh changes effectively.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra partners with Orange Business for a 5-year strategic global digital transformation, focusing on AI automation and secure platforms.
Tech Mahindra trades at Rs.1344.75, intraday high Rs.1362.85 and low Rs.1313.90, with Rs.89.37M turnover from 66,677 shares.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra partners with Orange Business for a 5-year strategic global digital transformation, focusing on AI automation and secure platforms.
Tech Mahindra trades at Rs.1344.75, intraday high Rs.1362.85 and low Rs.1313.90, with Rs.89.37M turnover from 66,677 shares.

news.title:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.
news.summary:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.

news.title:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.
news.summary:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.

news.title:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts price targets for 8 IT stocks, including Infosys, TCS, and Wipro, citing downside risks.
Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
